title: Data Warehousing Process: From Source to Insight
description: A flowchart illustrating the major features and functions of a data warehouse system, showing the flow of data from source systems through ETL processes to storage and finally to end-user analysis.
relationships: Operational Sources feed raw data into the ETL Process
ETL Process extracts data, transforms it for consistency, and loads it into the Staging Area
Staging Area holds transient data before loading into the Warehouse
Data Warehouse stores integrated, subject-oriented, historical data
Data Marts are subset from the Warehouse for specific departments
Metadata Repository describes and defines all data elements and processes
End-User Tools query the Warehouse and Marts for analysis and reporting
